chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-853 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A. No.489/2021 2. For orders on M.A. No.490/2021 20.01.2021 Mr. Humayoon Shoro advocate for petitioner. -.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2. The petitioner has filed this application seeking withdrawal of the petition on the ground stated therein. His learned counsel reiterates the contents of this application. Accordingly, the application is allowed as prayed and resultantly the petition stands dismissed as withdrawn with no order as to costs. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
